arts.ttl: Report: De Jong makes bold step towards deal amid Liverpool interest
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly moving quickly to secure Frenkie de Jong’s future, offering him a contract renewal in an effort to fend off growing Premier League interest. The Dutch midfielder, whose current deal runs until 2026, has been a long-term target for Liverpool and other top European clubs. arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool face prospect of first-teamer making summer transfer, Inter Milan target 34-game midfielder
arts.sum: Curtis Jones is liked by Inter Milan ahead of the summer transfer window, according to reports. The midfielder has been a consistent presence in Liverpool’s midfield this season, making 23 Premier League appearances and contributing three goals and as many assists. arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso sends message Liverpool will love after Champions League thrashing - 'You never know'
arts.sum: Former Liverpool midfielder Xabi Alonso has called on his Bayer Leverkusen team to summon upon the "Miracle of Istanbul" as they look to recover a 3-0 deficit against Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold fires PSG five-word warning as Darwin Nunez sends Liverpool message
arts.sum: Liverpool will be ready for a battle of the ages when they host Paris Saint-Germain at Anfield next week

arts.ttl: Liverpool sent Alexander Isak transfer update as 'only name' stance emerges
arts.sum: Liverpool have been linked with a move for Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak this summer as Arne Slot looks to strengthen his impressive squad.

arts.ttl: Kimmich REJECTS Arsenal and Liverpool interest to extend Bayern Munich contract
arts.sum: Kimmich’s current contract is set to expire this summer and there had been speculation that Bayern were ready to withdraw their renewal offer to the 30-year-old and allow him to become a free agent after he stalled on signing the extension. Davies had been expected to leave Bayern on a free this summer after rejecting numerous contracts and receiving a significant offer from Real Madrid but the Canadian opted to sign a five-year extension in February.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports drop evening contract bombshell that catches Liverpool in its radius
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich is now looking likelier to stay with Bayern Munich after progress was made in talks today, according to Sky Germany. The midfielder, who has been linked with a move away from the Bundesliga giants this summer, is now increasingly likely to stay in his home country. arts.ttl: 'Performance of my life' - Liverpool saved by 'best in world' Alisson
arts.sum: Alisson is described as "the best goalkeeper in the world" after his heroics help Liverpool produce a smash-and-grab performance to beat Paris St-Germain.

arts.ttl: 'Got run to the ground': Paul Merson names three Liverpool players he could see being dropped v Southampton
arts.sum: Liverpool pulled off one of the most unexpected results in recent football history when they left Paris Saint-Germain with a 1-0 win on Wednesday night....

arts.ttl: Should you Triple-Captain Salah at home to Southampton?
arts.sum: The Scout on the pros and cons of using your Triple Captain chip on Mohamed Salah (£13.8m) against Southampton in Gameweek 28 of Fantasy Premier League . It’s fair to say, though, that the Triple Captain chip offers far greater upside if used in a Double Gameweek, when a player has two matches to profit from.
